assertions.assertion: Operational store or token cleanup is configured with EnableTokenCleanup = true and TokenCleanupInterval = 1800
assertions.rationale: EnableTokenCleanup = true and TokenCleanupInterval = 1800 are set.

assertions.assertion: RemoveConsumedTokens is set to true and ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay is set to 300
assertions.rationale: The without_skill response only configures EnableTokenCleanup and TokenCleanupInterval. It does not include RemoveConsumedTokens = true or ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay = 300.
